Question:
Search for and retrieve the full text of the USACO 2024 US Open Platinum problem 'Identity Theft'. Ensure you include the full problem description, all constraints (N, M, etc.), and all sample input/output cases. Specifically, look for details regarding whether the goal involves minimizing length, avoiding prefixes, or avoiding substrings.
